title: exquisite British mushrooms Roast
description: a buttery crowd-pleaser featuring shio-koji and beurre-monte, suitable for all diets

ingredients.name: shio-koji
ingredients.notes: make sure to mix well with other ingredients before applying

instructions: in a small bowl, whisk together shio-koji, butter, and a pinch of salt
in a large skillet, melt 2 tablespoons of butter over medium heat
add the mushrooms to the skillet and cook until they release their moisture, about 5 minutes
add the shio-koji mixture to the skillet and stir to combine
transfer the mushrooms to a baking dish and top with a beurre-monte made from 2 tablespoons of softened butter and 1 tablespoon of heavy cream
bake in the preheated oven for 12-15 minutes or until the top is golden brown and the mushrooms are tender
if desired, garnish with chopped fresh herbs such as parsley or thyme
